result.stdout:
Edit Environment Variable v0.2.0
  A commandline tool to edit Edit environment variable.

USAGE
  EditEnv <envaction> [options]
  EditEnv [command] [...]

DESCRIPTION
  Set environment variable key value pair

PARAMETERS
* envaction         Action Choices: "Set", "Get", "Remove", "List". 

OPTIONS
  -k|--key          Environment variable key Default: "".
  -v|--value        Environment variable value Default: "".
  -t|--target       Environment variable target Choices: "Process", "User", "Machine". Default: "User".
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  PATH              PATH Command 
  export            Export all env var 
  import            Restore env from file. 

You can run `EditEnv [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Edit Environment Variable v0.2.0
  A commandline tool to edit Edit environment variable.

USAGE
  EditEnv import --input <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Restore env from file.

OPTIONS
* -i|--input        The data json file 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Edit Environment Variable v0.2.0
  A commandline tool to edit Edit environment variable.

USAGE
  EditEnv PATH <pathaction> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  PATH Command

PARAMETERS
* pathaction        Action Choices: "Add", "Remove", "List". 

OPTIONS
  -v|--value        Directory you want add to PATH Default: "".
  -t|--target       Environment variable target Choices: "Process", "User", "Machine". Default: "User".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
